series_metadata.series_description: Documents regarding lawsuits the Department of Insurance is involved in.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed; then destroy. If case is dismissed without prejudice, retain 1 year after statute of limitations runs; then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed; then destroy. If case is dismissed without prejudice, retain 1 year after statute of limitations runs; then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
